creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
The randomness of the failures is being caused by ASLR, which randomized the locations of the large objects, such as code, the heap, and the stack, in process memory space.  If I disable aslr:
  # sysctl kern.elf64.aslr.enable=0
  kern.elf64.aslr.enable: 1 -> 0
I see 100% build failures.
